title: Newgen Software is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Newgen Software is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Join the Newgen Software family as a Full Stack Developer in Lucknow. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Newgen Software:
Newgen Software is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Node.js

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Learning & development budget
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual performance appraisal
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Newgen Software!
